title: iberis linifolia subsp. contejeanii
intro: Iberis linifolia subsp. contejeanii, also known as the Alpine Cress or Snow Cress, is a plant species in the cress family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of compounds like isothiocyanates and flavonoids. The health benefits of Iberis linifolia subsp. contejeanii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Iberis linifolia subsp. contejeanii can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
